raw_title: Jorgovanka Tabaković: Overview of recent monetary and macroeconomic trends in Serbia
raw_content: Introductory speech by Dr Jorgovanka Tabaković, Governor of the National Bank of Serbia, at the presentation of the February Inflation Report, Belgrade, 19 February 2026.
